title: @undefinedKi: AMD JUST KILLED NVIDIA'S $4,000 AI BOX WITH A LUNCHBOX YOU CAN HOLD IN ONE HAND Lisa Su walked on stage, held a mini PC
summary: @undefinedKi: AMD JUST KILLED NVIDIA'S $4,000 AI BOX WITH A LUNCHBOX YOU CAN HOLD IN ONE HAND Lisa Su walked on stage, held a mini PC
whyItMatters: AMD JUST KILLED NVIDIA'S $4,000 AI BOX WITH A LUNCHBOX YOU CAN HOLD IN ONE HAND Lisa Su walked on stage, held a mini PC in one palm, and ran a 235-billion-parameter model live. No cloud, no rented GPU, no $4,000 NVIDIA box. It's built on AMD's Ryzen AI Max+ 395, the first x86 chip where CPU and GPU share one 128GB memory pool, up to ~110GB usable as VRAM on…
